scope: Read-only action-bucket triage of current Merchant item diagnostics after GMC cleanup

action_buckets.recommendation: Build no-write exact-ID attribute completion packet from current diagnostics.
Monitor; usually not a direct remediation target.
Manual catalog/policy review before edit; GTIN changes can be risky.
Manual review; avoid automated content edits.

interpretation.verdict: O próximo bloco com maior alavanca é P1 attribute_completion_preview, seguido por checkout_url_readonly_probe. Nenhum write foi executado; qualquer aplicação exigirá pacote exato e aprovação.
interpretation.recommended_next_safe_block: Build P1 attribute completion preview from exact current product IDs and issue attributes; output no-write approval packet only.
